name: io.github.urantia-hub/urantia-papers
title: Urantia Papers
description: A free, open MCP server for The Urantia Book — 197 papers, 1,626 sections, 14,500+ paragraphs, 4,400+ entities. Provides 13 tools (full-text + semantic search, paragraph lookup, entity browsing, audio), 2 resource templates (urantia://paper/{id} and urantia://entity/{id}), and 2 prompt templates (study_assistant, comparative_theology). No authentication required.
